center.name: 珀西·洛
center.summary: 珀西·洛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Philby's partridge，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Philby's partridge (Alectoris philbyi) or Philby's rock partridge, is a relative of the chukar, red-legged partridge and barbary partridges and is native to southwestern Saudi Arabia and northern Yemen

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Philby's partridge (Alectoris philbyi) or Philby's rock partridge, is a relative of the chukar, red-legged partridge and barbary partridges and is native to southwestern Saudi Arabia and northern Yemen
